title: heptapleurum bourdillonii
intro: Heptapleurum bourdillonii, also known as the Indian spleenwort, is a plant species in the family Dryopteridaceae, characterized by its fern-like appearance and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Heptapleurum bourdillonii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powder, and is recommended to be consumed under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
